steps.title: Use the shift rule
steps.content: Set B is made by adding $17$ microfarads to every value in set A. Adding the same number to every data value increases the mean by that number and leaves the range unchanged.

steps.title: Update the mean and range
steps.content:
From the dot plot, set A has mean $8$ microfarads and range $12$ microfarads. For set B:
$$8+17=25$$
The range stays $12$ microfarads.

steps.title: Select the true statement
steps.content: Set B has mean $25$ microfarads and range $12$ microfarads. The answer is C.
